title: Rich Creamy Ukrainian Whole Wheat Bread
description: A traditional Ukrainian bread recipe featuring whole wheat flour, blanched nuts, and a hint of cream, making it a comforting and satisfying treat.

ingredients.name: Active dry yeast
ingredients.notes: fresh and suitable for high-altitude baking

ingredients.name: Salt
ingredients.notes: unrefined and flake-form for better texture

ingredients.name: Unsalted butter
ingredients.notes: at room temperature for better blending

ingredients.name: Blanched almonds
ingredients.notes: chopped for added crunch and nutrition

instructions: Combine whole wheat flour, branched flour, yeast, sugar, and salt in a large mixing bowl.
Gradually add warm water while mixing with a wooden spoon or a stand mixer equipped with a dough hook until the dough comes together in a shaggy mass.
Add the egg and mix until the dough is smooth and elastic, about 5-7 minutes.
Knead the dough on a floured surface for 10-12 minutes until it becomes shiny and develops a smooth, even texture.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm, draft-free area for 1 hour, or until it has doubled in size.
Preheat the oven to 190°C with a baking stone or baking sheet inside, if available.
Punch down the dough and shape it into a round or oblong loaf.
Place the loaf on the preheated baking stone or baking sheet, and bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the bread is golden brown and sounds hollow when tapped on the bottom.
Remove the bread from the oven and let it cool on a wire rack for at least 10-15 minutes before slicing.
